asset_name: Four-Component Repair Blend FDA Parent Safety Controls
source_domain: FDA category-2 safety-risk statements for BPC-157, KPV and TB-500 fragment, plus distinct GHK-Cu identity and copper chemistry
prohibited_use: Personal dosing, injection, nasal-use or reconstitution guidance
Parent-component evidence as proof of combination efficacy or safety
Authorised, trial or sponsor-controlled evidence transfer to supplier blends
